# Next steps

Follow HashiCorp guidance for <a href="https://developer.hashicorp.com/vault/docs/concepts/production-hardening" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Vault production hardening</a>.

For further information on adopting Vault Enterprise within your organization according to HashiCorp Validated Designs, visit [Vault: Operating Guide for Adoption](/validated-designs/vault-operating-guides-adoption).
